personality: 6 Glass / Luxe DARK infused with Apple Intelligence 'Liquid Glass' UI
personality_one_liner: A cinematic, deeply atmospheric, and premium AI companion that feels alive, fluid, and profoundly intelligent.

spacing.rule: Use generous vertical padding to create a cinematic feel. Do not crowd elements. Let the glowing orbs and glass surfaces breathe.

do's: Use 'Liquid Glass' effect: heavy blur combined with a translucent brand-tinted base underneath.
Apply glass to the bottom tab bar, floating microphone container, sticky headers, and modal scrims.
Use glass on featured onboarding cards placed over the fluid background.
dont's: Do not apply blur to body text areas, standard list rows, or standard form inputs.
Avoid stacking more than two glass layers to prevent muddiness.

screens.name: Splash
screens.purpose: Introduce the premium AI vibe with the Hello Sara logo floating over a deep, slow-moving fluid aurora.

states.loading: Logo fades in, background aurora breathes slowly.

screens.layout: Full-bleed background image with absolute positioned logo at the center. Use Reanimated for a subtle pulsing scale effect on the logo.

screens.name: Onboarding
screens.purpose: Educate users about the AI capabilities through highly visual, cinematic glassmorphic cards.
screens.layout: Full-bleed fluid gradient background. A horizontal flatlist of glassmorphic cards (surfaceSecondary with blur). Each card contains a 3D icon/illustration, a title (xl), and a description (base). A sticky 'Get Started' button at the bottom.

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: Frictionless entry using Google OAuth or Email.

states.error: Standard inline error message below the failed input.

screens.layout: Minimalist form. Logo at the top, followed by a 'Welcome back' heading. Google sign-in button (pill, borderStrong outline), divider, then email/password inputs (surfaceTertiary background, no border until focused). Sticky submit button.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: The core AI interaction surface, featuring the animated Sara character and the glowing voice mic.

states.error: Orb turns subtle red/warning color if connection fails.

screens.layout: Header: Large typography 'Hello, I'm Sara'. Center: A large, abstract glowing orb (Sara) that uses Skia or Reanimated to pulse, blink, and morph. Bottom: A massive, glowing glassmorphic microphone FAB positioned just above the tab bar. The mic should have an expanding gradient ring (Purple to Cyan) when active/listening.

screens.name: Memory
screens.purpose: Searchable database of what Sara has learned about the user.

states.empty: Glass card with 'Memory is empty' illustration, explaining that Sara learns over time.
states.error: Centered error text with a 'Retry' pill button.

screens.layout: Sticky glass header with a search bar and a horizontally scrolling row of filter chips (brandTertiary). Below, a Masonry or 2-column grid of memory cards (surfaceSecondary) detailing facts.

screens.name: History
screens.layout: SectionList grouped by Date. Each row is a surfaceSecondary card showing a snippet of the conversation, time, and an icon. Stick section headers (Date) using a glass effect.

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: Comprehensive app configuration including Appearance, Voice, and Privacy.
screens.layout: Standard iOS-style grouped list. Sections: Appearance, Voice, Language, Permissions, Privacy, About. Rows have a left icon (brandTertiary tinted container), title, and right chevron/toggle.

splash_background.alt: Dark purple and blue flowing holographic fluid shapes

sara_avatar_idle.alt: A subtle purple glowing orb in the dark

sara_avatar_active.alt: A bright purple and cyan glowing light

instructions_to_main_agent: Theme Architecture: You MUST implement 3 themes: Light, Dark, and AMOLED. The AMOLED theme is identical to Dark but sets `surface` to `#000000` and darkens `surfaceSecondary` to `#09090B` to save battery and look seamless on OLED screens.

Sara Character Implementation: Since we lack a 3D model, use the provided `sara_avatar_idle` and `sara_avatar_active` images inside a Reanimated component that scales up/down slowly (breathing effect). Wrap it in an expo-blur or Reanimated shadow drop-shadow that pulses between Purple (#7C3AED) and Cyan (#06B6D4).

Glowing Mic Interaction: The voice microphone button MUST be the visual centerpiece of the Home screen. Implement a 60fps-style fluid animation using Reanimated. When idle, it has a soft purple glow. When pressed/listening, it should expand with a multi-layered cyan/purple ring that pulses.

Liquid Glass UI: Ensure the bottom tab bar and sticky headers use `expo-blur`. Important: text placed ON TOP of a glass surface must use `onSurface` and have perfect readability. If the background makes it hard to read, add a translucent dark tint (`rgba(9,9,11,0.7)`) underneath the blur layer.

Onboarding: Use the `splash_background` holographic image as a full-bleed backdrop behind the onboarding cards. Use a gradient scrim (top to bottom, transparent to 80% surfaceInverse) if text needs to go directly over it.

Data structure preparation: Keep in mind Phase 1 requires foundation for Users, Settings, History, Memories, and Reminders. Build UI states (Loading/Empty/Error) gracefully assuming FastAPI + MongoDB integration.
